author: mark
text:
cli: accept bare-hex task ids without bl- prefix

Normalize task id arguments at the CLI boundary: pure ASCII hex
without a bl- prefix is rewritten to bl-xxxx before the command
layer sees it. Applied to every subcommand that takes a task id —
show, claim, review, close, drop, update, dep add/rm/tree, link
add/rm, create --parent/--dep, list --parent. Storage and
serialized task files are unchanged. Prefixed ids still work for
copy-paste from delivery tags. sync --task is left alone because
it also accepts remote keys. 9 new unit tests + 8 new integration
tests; 100% coverage maintained.
